title: Embodied3DBench: Benchmarking Low-Level Embodied Spatial Intelligence of Vision Language Models
abstract: 当前的视觉语言模型能否理解并推理三维环境中的复杂具身交互？我们提出了Embodied3DBench——一个面向具身三维环境、以机器人为中心的基准测试，旨在评估低层级空间智能。该系统性地评估基础感知能力的基准包含六大任务类别，分为两个核心组：空间结构理解（定位、空间关系预测、多视图对应）和交互导向感知（功能属性预测、抓取点预测、轨迹预测）。该基准涵盖12个子类别，包含超过2.1万组高质量问答对。我们评估了13个最先进模型，结果表明：当前模型虽在高层级空间推理（如理解物体间位置关系）上表现较优，但在交互导向感知方面仍显薄弱，凸显出对鲁棒的三维感知交互先验知识的显著缺失。为主动弥合基准揭示的能力鸿沟，我们进一步合成了包含130万问答对的大规模训练数据集。值得注意的是，基于该数据集的微调显著提升了低层级空间智能表现。最终，Embodied3DBench通过提供系统性评估框架与可扩展数据方案填补了关键空白，为交互感知多模态系统的发展树立了明确目标。
preview_text: Are current Vision Language Models (VLMs) ready to comprehend and reason about complex embodied interactions in 3D environments? We introduce Embodied3DBench, a robot-centric benchmark targeting low-level spatial intelligence in embodied 3D environments. To systematically evaluate these foundational perceptual capabilities, the benchmark includes 6 task categories divided into two core groups: Spatial Structural Understanding (Grounding, Spatial Relation Prediction, and Multi-view Correspondence) and Interaction-Oriented Perception (Affordance Prediction, Grasp Point Prediction, and Trajectory Prediction). The benchmark spans 12 subcategories and contains over 21k high-quality question-answer pairs. We evaluate 13 state-of-the-art models, and the results show that while current models exhibit relatively strong high-level spatial reasoning, such as understanding object-to-object positional relations, they remain fragile in interaction-oriented perception, highlighting a significant lack of robust 3D-aware interaction priors. To actively bridge this capability gap revealed by our benchmark, we further synthesize a large-scale training dataset comprising 1.3M QA pairs. Notably, fine-tuning on this dataset yields significant improvements in low-level spatial intelligence. Ultimately, Embodied3DBench fills a critical gap by providing both a systematic evaluation framework and a scalable data solution, setting a clear target for the development of interaction-aware multimodal systems.
one_line_summary: 该论文主要评估视觉语言模型在3D环境中的低级空间智能，与强化学习、VLA、扩散模型等关键词相关性较低。
